title: Core Quest Asset Manifest
description: Sidecar file committed alongside each generated sprite sheet. Records the inputs that produced the artifact so the pipeline can detect 'unchanged' and skip work.

version.description: Manifest schema version. Bump when schema changes.

spec_path.description: Path (repo-relative) to the YAML spec that produced this asset.

stage.description: Which pipeline stage produced this artifact.

input_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical input bundle (source PNG + relevant spec fields). Used for idempotency.

input_files.description: Repo-relative paths of files that were inputs.

outputs.description: Repo-relative paths of files this stage produced.

params.description: Stage-specific params (model name, reference strength, frame counts, etc).

notes.description: Free-form notes (e.g., 'manual touchup applied after this run').
